creator: hans@nordhaug.priv.no
text:
The homepage for Whirlgif (located at http://www.danbbs.dk/~dino/) is gone.
Checked Archive.org and used Google to find the author's new homepage. Nothing.
I have tried to tracked down the most reliable site with the source available
and ended up with the Debian archives.

PS! I can take ownership of this port - if it's any point in that.
